creator: pavel@lynx.gts.elcom.ru
text:
There is a problem which I haven't solved yet. We need to install
serial communication board AccelePort 8r-PCI , while configuring our custom kernel. 
The only thing which i've found was drivers & instructions for 
Digiboard PC/Xi and Pc/Xe which are ISA adaptors.
Can you help me in this question?
